title: Crispy Shattering Italian Teque Os Ravioli
description: A quick-fix, pungent, Italian dish featuring pre-fried Teque Os slow-cooked in a rich sauce and served in a delicate ti-leaf wrap.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add canned crushed tomatoes, sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add pre-fried Teque Os to the skillet and simmer, uncovered, for 10-12 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Meanwhile, preheat a dry non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Once the ti-leaf wraps are pliable, wrap each one around a portion of the Teque Os and sauce, forming a ravioli shape.
Cook the ti-leaf wraps for 30-60 seconds on each side, until slightly crispy and golden brown.
Serve immediately, topped with grated Parmesan cheese.
Repeat with remaining Teque Os and ti-leaf wraps.
